combos.notes: WBO #1 all-time (3087pts, 900 wins). Used by BOTH World Championship 2025 Gold and Silver medalists. Undisputed best combo in competitive Beyblade X.
WBO #2 all-time (1400pts, 276 wins). World Championship 2025 Silver medalist (Balya). Dominant attack combo with consistent tournament results.
WBO #3 all-time (818pts, 717 wins). World Championship 2025 Silver medalist (Balya). Left-spin stealer, only blade that defeats Wizard Rod in pure endurance.
WBO #4 all-time (699pts, 187 wins). World Championship 2025 Gold medalist (Leobardo). Aggressive Low Rush attack from low height.
WBO #5 all-time (416pts, 775 wins). Massive win count shows long-term consistency. 9-60 ratchet provides high contact and KO resistance.
Community favorite stamina combo. Widely recommended by BeyBase, BeyXDB, and content creators. Strong all-around performance though 1-60 Hexa now preferred in tournaments.
World Championship 2025 Gold medalist (Leobardo). Aero Pegasus at 38g is one of the heaviest blades. Level bit provides high LAD (Life After Death).
WBO #6 all-time (370pts, 77 wins). Rising in Feb 2026 (rank 5, up 1). Free Ball's free-spinning tip maximizes stamina with reverse-boosting 1-60 ratchet.
WBO #7 all-time (355pts, 185 wins). Hover Wyvern's X-tier defensive shape with Kick bit for balanced movement. PXD rates Hover Wyvern as X-tier defender.
World Championship 2025 Bronze medalist (Berguiny). First CX combo to reach World Championship podium. High stamina Free Ball with defensive Wall assist.
WBO #8 all-time (333pts, 71 wins). Rising fast in Feb 2026 (rank 6, up 3). Rush bit with reverse-boosting 1-60 ratchet for aggressive attack.
WBO #9 all-time (329pts, 71 wins). Rising in Feb 2026 (rank 7, up 2). 6-60 provides good balance of contact points and height.
JacobPomegranate's #1 ranked California deck combo. 1-60 reverse-boosting ratchet maximizes spin stealing. Defeats Wizard Rod Ball in pure endurance.
WBO 267pts, 33 wins. HOTTEST rising combo: up 6 ranks in Feb 2026. Blade competitive score 7.82 (highest in database). Meteor Dragoon is the breakout blade of 2026.
WBO #10 all-time (293pts, 361 wins). Massive win count shows long-term consistency. Phoenix Wing is a top attack blade with great smash.
JacobPomegranate's primary attack combo. Well-balanced attacker at 38g with great stamina for continuous strong attacks.
BeyBase Infinity Stadium recommended. Reverse-boosting 1-70 ratchet with high-speed, high attack power Low Rush for tenacious attack.
Newcomer to the meta. Proven to be a second coming of Hells Scythe thanks to excellent balance and mixture of endurance and aggression.
WBO 292pts, 78 wins. MASSIVE rise in Feb 2026: up 18 ranks! Reverse-boosting 1-60 ratchet variant gaining huge popularity.
WBO 288pts, 98 wins. AWWC signature BeyLocker combo. 4-50 low ratchet maximizes contact with aggressive Low Rush movement.
World Championship 2025 Bronze medalist (Berguiny) combo. Explosive attack power with controlled movement from defensive X-tier blade.
WBO 248pts, 29 wins. Jumped 16 ranks in Feb 2026! Taller 7-70 ratchet variant of the Meteor Dragoon Level combo. Blade competitive score 7.82.
Great endurance with highly defensive shape. Very low height and respectable weight shuts down attacks and outlasts almost all opponents.
WBO #14 all-time (279pts, 128 wins). Reverse-boosting 1-60 ratchet with Rush bit on heavy 38g Aero Pegasus blade.
WBO #15 all-time (268pts, 257 wins). High volume of wins shows strong consistency. 9-60 ratchet variant of the dominant Cobalt Dragoon Elevate combo.
JacobPomegranate's deck. Heavy 39g all-out attacker. Threatens Cobalt Dragoon Elevate and most pure stamina blades.
BeyBase top-tier attack combo. Low Rush lets Dran Buster hit from even lower, giving more dynamic contact with reverse-boosting 1-60 ratchet.
Aims to KO and Xtreme Finish anything in its path. BeyBase recommended attack combo.
BeyBase recommended. Excellent combination of high endurance, knock-out chance, and versatility. Consistent results since launch.
Strong Shark Scale stamina build. Low Rush variants now preferred in tournaments but Ball version remains solid for casual play.
Part of BeyLocker competitive deck. Silver Wolf's free spinning ring provides great defense with Hexa's balanced stamina.
Multiple WBO tournament wins. Precision and control with well-balanced design.
Balanced combo with good all-around performance. Consistent results.
Safe combo with lots of raw endurance and slightly less KO potential. Does relatively well against just about anything.
Reddit tournament winner deck combo. Knight Mail blade competitive score 1.09 in WBO data (439pts, 403 usage). Solid defensive stamina build.
WBO 146pts, 42 wins. Clock Mirage blade competitive score 4.33 (high). Recommended by JacobPomegranate. Defeats Wizard Rod and Silver Wolf.
Classic high stamina-attack combo. Dominated early WBO tournaments. Still competitive but newer combos are preferred.
WBO tournament staple with multiple 1st place finishes. High-speed aggressive smash attacks.
Great recoil and weight for reliable KOs. Rush bit provides aggressive but controlled movement.
BeyXDB recommended attack combo. Low Rush provides aggressive movement from low height.
Reddit tournament winning deck combo. Golem Rock blade competitive score 1.82 in WBO data (691pts, 379 usage). Defensive wall with Spike stability.
Strong attack with good stamina retention. Hybrid attack-stamina build.
Classic aggressive attack combo with strong burst potential.
Balanced combo good for beginners. Phoenix Wing among best attack blades for smash attack consistency.
Strong mobile attack combo with gear movement pattern.
High KO potential with aggressive movement. 1-60 Low Rush build now preferred.
Solid defensive combo with great stamina. Consistent in defense-oriented matchups.
Defensive stamina combo, hard to KO. Orbit bit provides free-spinning movement.
Solid defensive wall, absorbs hits well. High ratchet for stability.
MBBC benchmark combo used in 6+ Theory Crafting videos (Jan-Mar 2026). Consistent meta attack option alongside Shark Scale.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Meteor Dragoon combo. Listed first in 'My Favorite Meteor Dragoon Combos' video chapters.
MBBC benchmark combo used in 4+ Theory Crafting videos. Consistent defensive meta option.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. High-sides ratchet variant for aggressive play.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Low Flat bit for aggressive movement pattern.
Jacob Pomegranate recommended stamina combo. 'The Stamina Beyblade X Combo YOU Should Be Using' video (Jan 2026).
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Rush bit variant of the dominant Wizard Rod 1-60 platform.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Emperor Might combo. Heavy assist blade adds weight for defense.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Wolf Hunt combo. Jaggy assist for aggressive recoil attack.
MBBC Theory Crafting tested CX combo. Featured in 'HARDEST HITTING Beyblade' video (Jan 2026).
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Phoenix Flare combo. Jaggy assist for burst attack.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Wall assist provides defensive stability with Hexa stamina.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Heavy assist adds weight for stronger hits.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Wall assist for defensive Emperor Might build with Hexa stamina.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Low-profile 4-50 ratchet for aggressive CX attack build.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Wolf Hunt combo. Wall assist for defensive-aggressive hybrid.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite TriceraPress combo. Hexa bit for stamina-defense balance.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Phoenix Rudder combo. Low Rush for aggressive movement.
Featured as test opponent in HobbyTalk Wolf Hunt video. Confirmed competitive attack combo.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Sol Eclipse combo (Upper Mode). Dual assist blade for balanced performance.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Ghost Circle combo. 9-70 ratchet for high stamina performance.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Dagger Dran combo. Point bit for balanced aggression.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Dagger Dran attack combo. Low Rush for aggressive movement.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Mummy Curse combo. Hexa bit for stamina-defense balance.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Mummy Curse combo. Low-profile 1-60 ratchet for stability.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Sword Dran combo. High-sides ratchet with Kick balance.
Featured as meta test opponent in HobbyTalk Wolf Hunt and MBBC videos. Confirmed competitive defense.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite. Aggressive defense with Low Rush on tall 7-70 ratchet.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Sword Dran combo. Low Rush for movement-based attack.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren's #1 favorite Hells Hammer combo. Point bit for balanced movement.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Hells Hammer combo. Rush bit for aggressive play.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite Phoenix Rudder combo. Taper bit for stamina with movement.
HobbyTalk Haru Ren favorite TriceraPress combo. Rush bit for mobile defense.
